prompt: A tropical sandy beach with golden sand, turquoise ocean waves, palm trees lining the shore, and a distant green hillside under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. Ahead toward the ocean, shallow surf breaks over a sandbar. Beyond the current view, a few swimmers wade in the water. Behind the current view, a row of thatched beach huts and rental umbrellas line the upper beach near a paved promenade. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, looking toward the ocean along the beach.

tracking_object.desc: bright yellow surfboard standing upright in the sand
